decomposition.question: Did EU President Ursula Von Der Leyen state that the EU protects freedom of speech? If so, when and where?
Was a man arrested for speaking out against Ursula Von Der Leyen or the EU? If so, who was arrested, when, where, and what were the specific charges?
Are there any official statements or records linking Ursula Von Der Leyen's statements on freedom of speech to the alleged arrest?
Who is "@basilthegreat" and what is the context of their claim?
